clues: The company's phone system cannot make or receive external calls.
Internal calls between office extensions still work normally.
The VoIP gateway shows registration status as 'Authentication Failed' with the SIP trunk provider.
The SIP trunk credentials have not been changed recently according to the phone system administrator.
The SIP trunk provider sent a notice that they updated their authentication protocol requirements last week.
